Johnson Family Vacation (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,203,964Details
International Box Office $82,795
Worldwide Box Office $31,286,759
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,375,307 (30.0% of total gross)
Legs:3.33 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:99.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$12,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:1,317 opening theaters/1,326 max. theaters, 5.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $60,096,524

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 7th, 2004 (Wide) by Fox Searchlight
Video Release: August 10th, 2004 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some sexual references, crude humor and brief drug use
Running Time: 97 minutes
Franchise: Johnson Family
Plot point: African Americans, Dysfunctional Family, Family Vacations, Relationships Gone Wrong
Social setting: Family Reunion
Subgenre: Family Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
